nodes.name: Stripe-necked tody-tyrant
nodes.summary: Stripe-necked tody-tyrant（Stripe-necked tody-tyrant，学名 Hemitriccus striaticollis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联17个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 戈亚斯州
nodes.summary: 戈亚斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括小拟䳍、Red-throated piping guan、斑耳冠蜂鸟等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 库斯科大区

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: griseiceps has a very limited range along the lower Tapajos River in Brazil's western Pará state. The Amazonian population of the stripe-necked tody-tyrant primarily inhabits somewhat open landscapes including semi-humid to humid secondary woodland and thickets and bamboo along watercourses
